global.title: Light Theme Base Palette
global.content: Achra and Vetra share an identical light theme base palette defined under the :root selector. Surface colors: --background: #FCFCFC, --foreground: #343839, --foreground-70: rgba(52, 56, 57, 0.5), --foreground-50: rgba(52, 56, 57, 0.3). Card colors: --card: #FCFCFC, --card-foreground: #343839, --card-foreground-50: rgba(52, 56, 57, 0.5). Secondary: --secondary: #F4F4F4, --secondary-foreground: #343839. Muted: --muted: #EFEFEF, --muted-foreground: #9EA0A1. Border and input: --border: #D7D8D9, --input: #FFFFFF, --ring: #343839. Popover: --popover: #FFFFFF, --popover-foreground: #343839. Accent: --accent: #F3F5F7, --accent-foreground: #000000. The Powerhouse parent brand also shares these same light theme base values (with the exception of its unique gradient accent tokens). Source: colors.css files at https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems.
global.description: Shared light theme surface colors across Achra and Vetra: background #FCFCFC, foreground #343839, card #FCFCFC, border #D7D8D9.
